approved_items: Apple MacBook (any model approved by IT department)
Company Car (vehicle lease, insurance, regular servicing and maintenance)
Manager.notes: Managers can submit multiple purchase requests during the year, provided the total combined value does not exceed the yearly limit

approved_items: Apple MacBook for development and engineering activities
Company Car (basis of business justification and department approval)
Senior IC.notes: Where a car is requested, the Senior IC must provide a short business justification and obtain approval from their line manager

approved_items: Lenovo Laptop (standard specification as defined by IT department)
IC.notes: Any additional requests outside the standard laptop must be escalated to the department head for consideration

general_notes: All purchases must comply with the Procurement Guidelines of PaperShare
All purchases require pre-approval via the internal Purchase Request System
The company reserves the right to amend this policy at any time
Policy is applicable to all permanent employees of PaperShare
Purchase limits are per fiscal year
